title: Temporary health care coverage: If you need to apply for coverage - Canada.ca
content:
Temporary health care coverage

## If you need to apply for coverage
If you qualify for the Interim Federal Health Program (IFHP), you don’t need to apply for coverage unless:
- you think you’re eligible but don’t have any of the IFHP eligibility documents
- your refugee claim was rejected and your Refugee Protection Identity Document (RPID) or Refugee Protection Claimant Document (RPCD) has expired or has been lost, stolen or destroyed
- you need to restart or extend your coverage
- you’re requesting coverage through the Minister’s discretion

## How to apply for IFHP coverage
- Prepare your application Read Guide 5568 for instructions on how to apply. Download and fill out the form: Application for IFHP Coverage (IMM 5564) (opens in a new tab) .

### Prepare your application
Read Guide 5568 for instructions on how to apply.
Download and fill out the form: Application for IFHP Coverage (IMM 5564) (opens in a new tab) .
- Apply online Create or sign in to your IRCC secure account . Under the heading “what would you like to do today,” select “apply for the Interim Federal Health Program (IFHP).” Upload your saved application form. You’ll receive a response to your application by email through your account. If you can’t apply online You can apply by mail by following these steps: Print, sign and date your application form. Include your supporting documents. Use enough postage. Mail your completed application to the nearest centre .
- Create or sign in to your IRCC secure account .
- Under the heading “what would you like to do today,” select “apply for the Interim Federal Health Program (IFHP).”
- Upload your saved application form.
- You’ll receive a response to your application by email through your account.
You can apply by mail by following these steps:
- Print, sign and date your application form.
- Include your supporting documents.
- Mail your completed application to the nearest centre .
- Keep your information up to date Contact us using our web form if: you change your address there are changes to your family situation you have new information that is important to your application

### Keep your information up to date
Contact us using our web form if:
- you change your address
- there are changes to your family situation
- you have new information that is important to your application
- Get treated If we approve your application, you can get health services right away.
If we approve your application, you can get health services right away.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
